name: PAY_RETRO_REL_STATUS
query: SELECT prr.RETRO_RELATIONSHIP_ID, prr.PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID, prr.REPROCESS_DATE, prr.START_DATE, decode (pra.action_status, null, prr.APPROVAL_STATUS, 'C', pra.action_status, 'E', pra.action_status, prr.APPROVAL_STATUS) APPROVAL_STATUS, prr.RETRO_REL_ACTION_ID, prr.SUPERSEDING_RETRO_REL_ID, prr.CREATED_BY, prr.CREATION_DATE, prr.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, prr.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, prr.LAST_UPDATED_BY FROM PAY_RETRO_RELATIONSHIPS prr, PAY_PAYROLL_REL_ACTIONS pra WHERE prr.retro_rel_action_id = pra.payroll_rel_action_id (+)
